whatsapp.description: lharries/whatsapp-mcp — QR code auth once via mobile app. Go bridge must be running.

youtube-transcript.description: Fetches transcripts from public YouTube videos — NO auth needed

fetch.description: Fetches any public URL and returns Markdown — NO auth needed

github.description: Official GitHub remote MCP — OAuth via VS Code 1.101+. No PAT needed inside Antigravity.
